calendar.matters:
Successor Trustee'S Petition For Instructions Re Funding Trust And Transfer Of Property
Off Calendar Jan-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Successor Trustee'S Petition For Instructions Re Funding Trust And Transfer Of Property
Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Continued To Jan-25-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Cullen for John McGovern.

Mr. Cullen stated that Catherine is a disabled person, that a good shepard fund was set up years ago, that she was subject to a special needs trust and that he thought she was in Fresno but that he was not sure. The Court stated that the issue was that Catherine Joan McGovern was not served and that she has a claim under probate code 850. The matter was continued to January 25, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Cullen to provide notice to Ms. McGovern.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Successor Trustee'S Petition For Instructions Re Funding Trust And Transfer Of Property
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Continued To Dec-14-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
